display: Sons of the Forest Dedicated Server ARM64

blob_sync_port.desc: UDP port used by the BlobSync system.

game_port.desc: UDP port used for gameplay netcode.

lan_only.desc: Restrict the server to LAN visibility only. Useful if you don't need/want the server to be publicly listed.

password.desc: Set the server password. Leave blank for no password.

query_port.desc: UDP port used by Steam to list the server.

skip_network_test.desc: Skips the public accessibility self-test on boot. Docker/NAT/Wine setups very commonly fail this test even when the server is actually reachable, since it relies on Windows networking calls (GetAdaptersAddresses) that misbehave under Wine/box64. Leave this ON unless you've verified your network supports NAT loopback/hairpin NAT and want the test to run.

commands: sh -c 'mkdir -p /tmp/sotf && until [ -f /tmp/sotf/SonsOfTheForestDS.exe ]; do if [ -f /root/steamcmd/linux64/steamcmd ]; then box64 /root/steamcmd/linux64/steamcmd +@sSteamCmdForcePlatformType windows +login anonymous +app_info_print 2465200 +quit > /dev/null; else steamcmd +@sSteamCmdForcePlatformType windows +login anonymous +app_info_print 2465200 +quit > /dev/null; fi && box64 /root/steamcmd/linux64/steamcmd +@sSteamCmdForcePlatformType windows +force_install_dir /tmp/sotf +login anonymous +app_update 2465200 validate +quit; if [ ! -f /tmp/sotf/SonsOfTheForestDS.exe ]; then echo "SteamCMD failed or crashed, retrying..."; sleep 2; fi; done && cp -r /tmp/sotf/. . && rm -rf /tmp/sotf'

run.command:
sh -c 'id -u sotf >/dev/null 2>&1 || useradd -m sotf || adduser -D sotf; mkdir -p /home/sotf/.steam/sdk64; if [ -f ./linux64/steamclient.so ]; then cp ./linux64/steamclient.so /home/sotf/.steam/sdk64/; elif [ -f /root/steamcmd/linux64/steamclient.so ]; then cp /root/steamcmd/linux64/steamclient.so /home/sotf/.steam/sdk64/; fi; mkdir -p ./config; cat > ./config/dedicatedserver.cfg << EOF
{
  "IpAddress": "0.0.0.0",
  "GamePort": ${game_port},
  "QueryPort": ${query_port},
  "BlobSyncPort": ${blob_sync_port},
  "ServerName": "${name}",
  "MaxPlayers": ${max_players},
  "Password": "${password}",
  "LanOnly": ${lan_only},
  "SaveSlot": 1,
  "SaveMode": "Continue",
  "GameMode": "Normal",
  "SaveInterval": 600,
  "IdleDayCycleSpeed": 0.0,
  "IdleTargetFramerate": 5,
  "ActiveTargetFramerate": 60,
  "LogFilesEnabled": false,
  "TimestampLogFilenames": true,
  "TimestampLogEntries": true,
  "SkipNetworkAccessibilityTest": ${skip_network_test},
  "GameSettings": {},
  "CustomGameModeSettings": {}
}
EOF
chown -R sotf:sotf . /home/sotf/.steam; exec runuser -u sotf -- env PATH="/wine-installer/bin:$PATH" WINEPREFIX="/home/sotf/.wine" xvfb-run --auto-servernum --server-args="-screen 0 640x480x24:32" box64 wine ./SonsOfTheForestDS.exe -userdatapath "./config"'

name: sonsoftheforest-arm64
